"NEXT DAY, AS NEWS OF DICE'S STRANGE DEATH RESOUNDS THROUGH GOTHAM CITY..."
"DICE DIED BEFORE THE VERY EYES OF THOSE 20 PEOPLE! LOOKED LIKE AN AUTOPSY MIGHT REVEAL SOMETHING—OTHER THAN DEATH FROM NATURAL CAUSES. IF IT CANNOT, THEN THIS IS MURDER..."
"STILL, THERE WAS THAT NOTE, COMMISSIONER... COULD IT HAVE BEEN A COINCIDENCE IF DICE FELLS HADN'T TOUCHED THE NOTE—AND THEN THROWN IT AWAY...", "BATMAN, I KNOW YOU LOVE A MYSTERY—BUT THIS COULDN'T BE MURDER—IT'S IMPOSSIBLE. COME ON, NOW—I'VE MORE IMPORTANT ASSIGNMENTS FOR YOU...", "BUT, TWO DAYS LATER..."
"COMMISSIONER GORDON—THIS IS FRED BARKER. I'VE RECEIVED THE SAME-TYPE OF DEATH-NOTE THAT JIM DICE DID! YOU'VE GOT TO HELP ME!". "CALM YOURSELF, BARKER! SOME PRACTICAL JOKER IS TAKING ADVANTAGE OF DICE—BUT DON'T WORRY—JUST TO BE SAFE, I'LL HAVE YOUR HOUSE BE FULL OF POLICE TONIGHT...",  "THEN, THAT EVENING..."
"WATERS AND COMMISSIONER GORDON! BUT YOU'RE EARLY—HAS SOMETHING GONE WRONG?"
"WE'RE NOT EARLY—YOUR WATCH MUST BE SLOW!—AND EVERYTHING'S FINE—THE POLICE WILL BE ALONG IN A MOMENT...", "AND, AS MIDNIGHT DRAWS NEAR..."
"EVERYTHING'S IN READINESS, COMMISSIONER. MY MEN ARE GUARDING EVERY ENTRANCE...", "SEE, FRED? YOU'RE GOING TO BE OKAY. COME ON—LET'S PLAY SOME CARDS TILL THIS HOAX BLOWS OVER."

But two watching figures have not been fooled by the Joker's clever ruse. Hurry! Those clocks are wrong -- they're running backwards!
Another of the Joker's reverse tricks! Watch that crowd! He's in there some place... Please let us pass! This man is ill!
That invalid in the wheelchair -- his shoes are dusty, he's been walking. He's a fake!  Batman's hunch is right, for suddenly...
Quick! Now's our chance. Now to start the Western Flier -- in reverse! It's a swell way to open up that locked gold car! Next time you play invalid, Joker, wipe the dust off your shoes!
And next time you play detective --
Another reversed crime! First the news story... then the getaway... and now he'll return to steal the gold!
What's all the fuss about down there?
